Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One), Request For Production Of Documents (Set One), And Request For Statement Of Damages (Set One), For An Order That
Off Calendar Jun-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. No contests. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THOMAS ROSSI's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One), Request For Production Of Documents (Set One), And Request For Statement Of Damages (Set One), For An Order That all objections are deemed waived and for an award of monetary sanctions.

Granted as to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production of Documents. Denied as to the Statement of Damages as it is not in compliance with CCP 425.11 as defendant is not allowed to ask for documents in support of the Statement of Damages. Plaintiff to serve verified responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One and Special Interrogatories, Set One in compliance with CCP 2030.210 et seq by July 12, 2021. Plaintiff to serve verified responses to Requests for Production of Documents, Set One in compliance with CCP 2031.210-240 and produce documents in compliance with CCP 2031.280(a) by July 12, 2021. Requests for sanctions is granted in the amount of $600 made payable to the Client Trust Fund of the Law Offices of John A. Biard. Sanctions to be paid no later than July 12, 2021.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312 to the Court at Klgallo@discoveryreferee.com

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
